scripts.build: bun run build:css && bun run build:dist
scripts.build:dist: rm -rf ./dist && mkdir -p ./dist/styles && cp ./index.html ./dist/index.html && cp -R ./assets ./dist/assets && cp ./assets/icons/icon.ico ./dist/favicon.ico && cp ./assets/example.html ./dist/example.html && cp ./styles/landing.css ./dist/styles/landing.css && cp ../scripts/install.sh ./dist/install.sh && cp ../scripts/install.ps1 ./dist/install.ps1
scripts.dev: bun run sync && concurrently -k -n css,sync,serve -c blue,green,yellow "tailwindcss -i ./landing.css -o ./dist/styles/landing.css --watch" "chokidar './index.html' './assets/**/*' '../scripts/**/*' -c 'bun run sync'" "browser-sync start --server dist --files 'dist/**/*' --no-open"
scripts.sync: mkdir -p ./dist/styles && cp ./index.html ./dist/index.html && rm -rf ./dist/assets && cp -R ./assets ./dist/assets && cp ./assets/icons/icon.ico ./dist/favicon.ico && cp ./assets/example.html ./dist/example.html && cp ../scripts/install.sh ./dist/install.sh && cp ../scripts/install.ps1 ./dist/install.ps1
